Title: Implement build_metadata_record()

Label: database

Label: database
Blocked By: Run first Alembic migration on dev DB
Description: Seed GeoLookup with LSOA→MSOA→LAD→Region mappings from ONS Open Geography Portal for all 22 Yorkshire LADs.

Label: transform

Title: Implement aggregate_to_lad()
Label: transform

Label: load
